projectDescription: A horror-themed VR memory card matching game built with A-Frame featuring immersive 3D graphics and timed gameplay
keyFeatures: Horror-themed casino environment with atmospheric lighting and sound
Timed memory card matching gameplay with 40-second survival timer
3D card flip animations and visual effects
Automatic game state management and board locking logic
publicApiSurface: initGame() - Initialize game board with shuffled cards
flip(card) - Handle card flip animation and logic
startTimer() - Begin countdown timer on first card interaction
die() - Game over handler when timer expires
win() - Victory handler when all pairs are matched
cardData array - Card image identifiers for matching pairs
lockBoard flag - Prevents race conditions during card comparison
